top_signals.title: Stock Futures Rise, Oil Falls on US-Iran Deal; Warsh Rocks Bond Market | Bloomberg Brief 6/18/2026
top_signals.summary: US equity futures climb and oil slumps as energy shipments begin to pass through the Strait of Hormuz following the signing of an interim deal between Washington and Tehran. Front-end Treasury yield jumps after Fed Chair Kevin Warsh's debut news conference. Christopher Hodge of Natixis discusses the potential changes at the Federal Reserve. Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua speaks to PhysicsX CEO & Co-Founder Jacomo Corbo on AI innovation at the VivaTech conference in Paris.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Wellington’s Geary Says Stocks Rotation Trade Is Coming Back
top_signals.summary: The end of the Iran war is reviving investor appetite for stocks outside the US, according to Scott Geary, the head of global wealth at Wellington Management.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: G7 calls for joint action on North Korean crypto theft, cybercrime
top_signals.summary: G7 leaders broadened their warning over North Korean crypto theft to include wider cybercrime as researchers link DPRK-affiliated actors to billions of dollars in stolen digital assets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
